projectDescription: A personal portfolio website for Patrick Foster showcasing his work experience, software projects, and class schedule, built with HTML and CSS.
keyFeatures: Animated hero section with hover-reveal text effects using CSS transitions
Software projects section (Courser, Wordsmith AI Chrome Extension)
Class schedule page with weekly timetable
Responsive design with mobile media queries
SVG wave shape dividers for visual section transitions
Fixed navigation button linking between pages
Animated waving hand GIF in the goodbye footer section
publicApiSurface: css/index.css — Primary stylesheet for the portfolio
css/about.css — Stylesheet for the schedule page
